THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBERTSON, VICTORIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: JONES HOTEL, 515 JONES ST, #5, SF, CA 94102 $669.68 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $669.68, STAYED UNTIL OCT-03-1995, THE DEFT VICTORIA ROBERTSON HAVING STIP THE JDGMT MAY BE EN- TERED IN FAVOR OF PLTF AS FOLLOWS: $669.68 TO BE PAID IN INSTLLMTS $200 ON 7/3;$200 ON 8/3;$200 ON 9/3;$69.68 ON 10/3 ALONG W/MO RENT OF $290 PER MONTH ON 1ST OF MONTH.
